config.title: Config Data
config.description: Configuration file for general simulation parameters.

animal.title: Animal data
animal.description: Input data and configuration information for animal management decisions, herd attributes, and housing properties.

animal_population.title: Animal population data
animal_population.description: Animal objects that herd initialization draws from during the simulation.

animal_mean_phenotype.title: Mean animal phenotype data by birth year
animal_mean_phenotype.description: The mean animal phenotype data by birth year.

animal_top_listing_semen.title: Animal Top Listing Semen data
animal_top_listing_semen.description: The top listing semen value for new born calves.

lactation.title: Lactation curve adjustment values
lactation.description: Values for the adjustment of the three wood parameters based on farm specific data

economy.title: Economy data
economy.description: Energy prices used in the EEE module.

emission.title: Emissions data
emission.description: General emission values used in the EEE module.

purchased_feeds_emissions.title: Emissions from purchased feeds
purchased_feeds_emissions.description: Purchased feeds emission values used in the EEE module.

purchased_feed_land_use_change_emissions.title: Land Use Change emissions from purchased feeds
purchased_feed_land_use_change_emissions.description: Purchased feeds land use change emission values used in the EEE module.

feed.title: Feed data
feed.description: Feeds available for each animal combination. Placeholder: default Midwest feed, not Zencht-specific rations.

NRC_Comp.title: NRC Comp data
NRC_Comp.description: Nutritional information for each feed, following NRC (2001) guidelines.

NASEM_Comp.title: NASEM Comp data
NASEM_Comp.description: Nutritional information for each feed, following NASEM (2021) guidelines.

manure_management.title: Manure Processor Configurations
manure_management.description: Configurations of manure processors used in Manure module.

manure_processor_connection.title: Manure Processor Connections
manure_processor_connection.description: The connection configs for all manure processors.

crop_configurations.title: Crop Configurations
crop_configurations.description: Configurations for how crops grow and are managed.

no_field.title: Field specification
no_field.description: Field characteristics and references to field management specifications.

no_crop.title: Crop data
no_crop.description: Crop selection and detailed rotation schedules.

weather.title: Weather data
weather.description: Weather data used during the simulation.

user_feeds.title: User Feed
user_feeds.description: Summary of feeds available for use in the simulation.
